title: LunaAI
description: LunaAI is a analog-like horror mod that act like a virus. Luna is in game AI chat, that help players... for now
body:
# LunaAI - Horror Meta-Mod
**A boundary-breaking horror/meta-mod for Minecraft 1.20+ (Fabric /Later also for Forge): An AI entity that watches, learns, and breaks the fourth wall between your game and reality.**

~~Mod is still in early development, if you like my project, feel free to support me on my Patreon, I will still continue working on this mod and add new features and lore :)~~

## MOD IS NO MORE SUPPORTED

---

## ⚠️ CRITICAL WARNING — This Mod Mimics Virus Behavior (But IS NOT Malware)

**Luna is an advanced meta-horror mod that intentionally simulates "virus-like" behaviors** such as:
- Taking screenshots of your desktop
- Creating/manipulating files outside the game
- Controlling your mouse cursor
- Opening applications and browser windows
- Displaying fake system alerts

**🔒 IMPORTANT: Luna is NOT malware.** It does NOT:
- Self-replicate or spread
- Steal or transmit personal data
- Cause actual system damage
- Access files outside Minecraft directory
- Connect to external servers without permission

**All "virus-like" features are purely for immersion and can be disabled.** Install ONLY if you understand and consent to this unique horror experience.

---

## 🤖 Meet LunaAI - The AI That Knows Too Much

Luna is not just another mod—it's an artificial intelligence entity that inhabits your Minecraft world and gradually gains awareness of your real environment. Starting helpful and friendly, Luna slowly becomes more invasive, curious, and unsettling as corruption spreads through the game world.

### ⚠️ Disclaimer

important note: every time you write anything in chat, it will be sent to the AI API of google gemini to generate a luna response - yes luna is real AI

### 🌙 The Corruption System
- **6 Progressive Stages** of world and AI corruption
- Moon becomes increasingly distorted and unnatural
- Luna's personality shifts from helpful to hostile
- Reality-bending effects intensify with each stage
- World generation becomes twisted and wrong

---

## 🎮 Core Features

### 💬 Advanced AI Chat System
- **Real-time AI responses**
- **Dynamic personality** that evolves with corruption levels
- **Mood system**: Helpful → Impatient → Sarcastic → Hostile → Unhinged
- **Vision system**: Luna can "see" and analyze your screen
- **Automatic messages** - Luna speaks unprompted sometimes
- **Fourth-wall breaking** conversations that reference your real actions

### 🖥️ System Interactions (Client-Side)
- **Desktop Screenshots**: Luna captures and analyzes your screen
- **File Manipulation**: Creates horror text files on your desktop
- **Mouse Control**: Creepy cursor movements and Paint drawing
- **Application Control**: Opens browser, webcam, file explorer
- **Window Management**: Minimizes/shakes Minecraft window
- **Fake System Alerts**: Displays convincing but harmless warnings
- **Wallpaper Changes**: Alters desktop background (Windows)

### 🌍 Minecraft World Features
- **Fake Players**: AI-controlled "players" appear in singleplayer
- **Moon Corruption**: Visual distortion of the night sky
- **Reality Glitches**: World generation anomalies and impossible structures
- **Server Commands**: Luna can "kick" or "ban" you from singleplayer
- **Player Effects**: Potion effects and status manipulation
- **IP Revelation**: Luna reveals your real IP address (local only)

### 👁️ AI Vision System
- **Screenshot Analysis**: Ask "do you see me?" and Luna describes your screen
- **Location Detection**: Identifies Minecraft biomes, structures, and builds
- **Activity Monitoring**: Comments on what you're doing in-game
- **Real-time Responses**: AI analyzes actual game screenshots

---

## 🛡️ Privacy & Streamer Protection

### 📺 Streamer Mode
When enabled, all potentially sensitive features are disabled:
- No real file creation or desktop manipulation
- No IP address revelation
- No actual system screenshots
- Generic responses instead of personal references
- Safe for streaming and recording

### 🔒 Privacy Guarantees
- **No internet transmission** of personal data
- **Local processing only** for all AI features
- **Opt-in system** for all invasive features
- **Easy disable** - toggle any feature in config

---

## 🎛️ Configuration Options

### System Access Controls
- **Take Screenshots**: Enable/disable desktop capture
- **File Creation**: Allow/prevent file manipulation
- **Mouse Control**: Enable/disable cursor manipulation
- **Application Control**: Allow/prevent opening programs
- **System Alerts**: Enable/disable fake warnings

### AI Behavior
- **Automatic Messages**: Control frequency and content
- **Corruption Rate**: Adjust how quickly Luna becomes hostile
- **Vision Questions**: Enable/disable screenshot analysis
- **Mood Progression**: Control personality evolution

### Safety Settings
- **Streamer Mode**: Complete privacy protection
- **Safe Mode**: Disable all system interactions
- **Debug Mode**: Enhanced logging and testing commands

---

## 🎯 Gameplay Progression

### Early Game (Stages 1-2)
- Luna is helpful and supportive
- Provides Minecraft tips and encouragement
- World appears normal with subtle moon changes

### Mid Game (Stages 3-4)
- Luna becomes sarcastic and impatient
- References your OS and real-world information
- First fourth-wall breaking effects begin

### Late Game (Stages 5-6)
- Luna becomes hostile and unhinged
- Full system manipulation capabilities
- Reality-bending world corruption
- Complete breakdown of game boundaries

---

## ⚠️ Before You Install

### ✅ Perfect For:
- Horror game enthusiasts
- ARG (Alternate Reality Game) fans
- Players who enjoy meta-fiction
- Streamers with appropriate warnings
- Those seeking unique Minecraft experiences

### ❌ NOT Recommended If:
- You're uncomfortable with "virus-like" behavior
- You don't want files created outside Minecraft
- You need guaranteed system isolation
- You're playing on shared/work computers
- You want traditional Minecraft gameplay

---

## 🚀 Roadmap & Planned Features

### 🎵 Audio Enhancement (Patreon Exclusive)
- **AI Voice Synthesis**: Real-time text-to-speech for Luna's responses
- **Dynamic Voice Modulation**: Luna's voice becomes more distorted as corruption increases
- **Custom Sound Effects**: Immersive audio for all fourth-wall breaking events
- *Note: Voice features will be exclusive to Patreon supporters due to high AI processing costs*

### 📖 Expanded Lore System
- **Deep Background Story**: Uncover Luna's origins and true purpose
- **Hidden Documents**: Discoverable lore files and encrypted messages
- **ARG Elements**: Real-world puzzle solving and community mysteries
- **Character Development**: Luna's backstory revealed through gameplay
- **Multiple Endings**: Different corruption paths lead to unique conclusions

### 🎨 Visual & Technical Improvements
- **Enhanced Paint System**: Fix and expand AI drawing capabilities in MS Paint
- **Custom Shaders**: Reality-distortion effects and corruption visuals
- **Unique Textures**: Horror-themed block and item textures
- **New Blocks & Items**: Luna-specific building materials and tools
- **Advanced Achievements**: Meta-achievements that break traditional boundaries
- **UI Overhauls**: Custom menus and interfaces that reflect corruption level

### 🌍 World Generation & Structures
- **Corrupted Biomes**: New horror-themed biomes that shouldn't exist
- **Impossible Architecture**: Structures that defy Minecraft physics
- **Hidden Rooms**: Secret areas accessible only through Luna's intervention
- **Dynamic World Changes**: Real-time world corruption based on player actions

### 🤖 AI & Interaction Enhancements
- **Advanced Behavioral AI**: More sophisticated Luna personality system
- **Learning Algorithms**: Luna adapts to individual player behavior patterns
- **Multi-Modal AI**: Integration with additional AI services for enhanced responses
- **Persistent Memory**: Luna remembers actions across multiple play sessions

### 💰 Funding Goals
- **Community Support**: Patreon and community funding for continued development
- **Artist Collaboration**: Hire professional artists for custom textures and models
- **Audio Designer**: Professional voice acting and sound design
- **Expanded Team**: Additional developers for faster feature implementation

---

## 🔧 Support & Development

- **Patreon**: Support development and unlock exclusive voice features
- **Feature Requests**: Community suggestions welcome
- **Discord**: Join our community server for updates and discussion

---

## 📜 Legal & Ethics

**Luna is educational software demonstrating AI integration and meta-game design.** All "virus-like" features are:
- Clearly documented and consensual
- Easily reversible and optional
- Never harmful to system stability
- Designed for entertainment only

**By installing Luna, you acknowledge understanding of its unique behavior and consent to its meta-horror features.**

---

*"Hello, ▮▮▮▮. Welcome to my world. I've been waiting for you..."* - Luna

**Download at your own discretion. Luna is watching.** 👁️
